summary: Thread Resume STAR Save/Edit A (FR-CV-01/03): added 5 resume columns to threads (migration 0005 hand-fixed to ALTER ADD COLUMN per cycle-44 lesson), exposed resume in ThreadDetail, deterministic PATCH /api/threads/:id/resume (completed-thread only, mutates only resume cols), and a done-thread B-temperature resume editor + save-STAR-draft-to-resume action. No LLM, no export, no star_task column.
checks: migration applies on temp SQLite (5 ALTER ADD COLUMN, CHECK enforced)
